title: GovernanceState
description: Master enum contract collecting all Peak governance state families. Reusable enum/contract definitions, not a stored data instance — no instances are committed to the repo. The three universal axes (authorization_scope, review_status, lifecycle_status) are referenced from their standalone schemas; the five domain-specific families are defined in this file's `$defs`. Other schemas reference the family enums by `$ref`. Storage-agnostic. See docs/GOVERNANCE_STATES.md and docs/STATE_TRANSITIONS.md. AgentNet grounding of governed records is intended future architecture, not implemented.

authorization_scope.description: How the record may be used.

source_system_access_status.description: Access status for a source system (for SourceSystemReference).

client_facing_approval_status.description: Client-facing approval state for any candidate deliverable.

EvidenceStatus.description: Status of an EvidenceReference. Distinguishes reported from verified; agents may set up to needs_verification, humans verify.

FinancialImpactStatus.description: Status of a FinancialImpactEstimate. Verification and client-facing approval require human/finance review; agents may not reach verified or client_facing_approved.

ResolverCapsuleStatus.description: Status of a ResolverCapsuleRecord. Methodology promotion and activation require governance approval; agents may propose but not approve.

SourceSystemAccessStatus.description: Access status for a client SourceSystemReference.

ClientFacingApprovalStatus.description: Client-facing approval state. Only humans may reach approved_for_client; agents may not.
